faq.a1: Pepe Wife is an elegant and playful memecoin project built on the Solana blockchain, designed to bring a touch of sophistication to the meme ecosystem.
faq.q2: How can I join the presale?
faq.a2: You can join the presale by connecting your wallet to our official website and exchanging USDT for $PWIFE tokens during the active presale stages.
faq.a3: Yes, our smart contract has been fully audited by leading security firms, and liquidity will be locked to ensure community safety.
faq.q4: When will the token be listed?
faq.a4: Token listing is planned for Phase 2 of our roadmap, starting with major decentralized exchanges (DEX) followed by centralized exchanges (CEX).

risk.title: Risk Warning
risk.p1: Cryptocurrency investments carry high risk. Pepe Wife ($PWIFE) is a memecoin project created for entertainment and community purposes. There is no guarantee of profit, and you should never invest money you cannot afford to lose.
risk.p2: Please conduct your own thorough research before participating in the presale. The market for memecoins is highly volatile. By participating, you acknowledge the risks involved and agree that the project team is not liable for any financial losses.
